title: Vasteras Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Västerås with a Z-Score of -4.74. This event has been classified as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Västerås are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The low temperatures are expected to persist, with a high heating demand of 17.6 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 68% and the wind speed is moderate at 7.9 km/h.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this extreme cold snap.
